issues.detail: The skill file lacks specific actionable instructions for the agent, providing only a role description without concrete tasks.
Error handling and edge case scenarios are not addressed in the examples or best practices.
The skill is tailored to Node.js and Sequelize, limiting applicability to other runtime environments.

scenarios.name: Define a typed User/Post model pair with associations
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses InferAttributes/InferCreationAttributes generics, hasMany/belongsTo with foreignKey+as, and the documented hook pattern; baseline writes a plain Model.init without the type-inference generics or named association aliases.

scenarios.name: Wrap a multi-step create in a transaction and add a migration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses sequelize.transaction callback with the transaction option threaded through every call and sequelize-cli for migrations (not sync); baseline often uses sync() or omits the transaction option on inner calls.
